context:
Current State:
- Cafeteria swapped out a few menu items; user liked the old options; this is distracting.
- Coping options suggested: try a new menu item as an experiment, pack preferred snacks/meals, scout a nearby alternative spot, or make a simple weekly meal plan to remove daily decision stress.
- User briefly looked into private tutors; scheduling and cost caused hesitation.
- Alternatives to private tutoring provided: short, targeted paid sessions (one or two focused meetings), swapping tutoring with a peer, using TA/office hours, joining or forming a small study group, tapping course forums/Discord, or free/low-cost online resources (lecture videos, problem walkthroughs).
- Offers available: suggest affordable tutoring strategies (how to get the most from one or two paid sessions), list free resources matched to topics, or help draft a message to a classmate/TA about forming a study swap.
